Index.title: Smart Medical Assistant
Index.description: Get expert OTC recommendations for common health concerns.
Index.safety_warning: Warning: This tool is for informational purposes only. Consult a doctor for serious conditions.

Survey.safety_warning: Provides medication information and OTC guidance. Not a substitute for a clinician or pharmacist. If symptoms persist, seek care.

hero.title: Make OTC guidance provably trustworthy.
hero.subtitle: Built on evidence and structured rules, with auditable traces and safety-first defaults — so each step from symptom intake to recommendations is explainable and reviewable.

pillars.title: Professional / Auditable / Safety-first
pillars.desc: Not “trust me” — but “check me”. We align recommendations to verifiable signals and prioritize escalation when risk is high.

professional.title: Professional
professional.desc: Turn complex symptoms and OTC decisions into clear, actionable steps.
professional.b2: Layered checks: red flags / contraindications / interactions

auditable.title: Auditable
auditable.desc: Not “I think so”, but “here is the basis”.

secure.title: Safety-first
secure.desc: Default to the safer side — prevent harm first.
secure.b1: Red flags block OTC guidance and suggest care

steps.title: Three steps: input → verify → act safely
steps.desc: Each step has clear inputs, outputs, and auditable traces — easy to review and explain.

s1.title: Input (symptoms/meds)
s1.desc: Start with symptom check or a medicine guide to clarify the goal.
s1.input: Complaint, associated symptoms, duration, meds history (optional)

s2.title: Auditable verification
s2.desc: Rules generate guidance and expose why each option matches.

s3.title: Act safely
s3.desc: Use guides, set reminders, or seek care when red flags exist.

proof.title: You get not only conclusions, but evidence.
proof.desc: We make key results traceable and reproducible so you can review them with confidence.

left.i1: Event timeline (what you entered, what the system did)

right.title: Safety-first (examples)
right.i1: Red flags block OTC suggestions and recommend care

ctaBlock.title: Turn “safety and audit” into a usable experience.
ctaBlock.desc: Start a symptom check and see the rule-hit trace and risk notes behind each option.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.desc: Clear answers for professional, auditable, safety-first guidance.
faq.a1: We attach ruleId, guidelineId and evidence descriptions to recommendations where possible, forming a trace you can review.
faq.q2: Why do you suggest seeking care first?
faq.a2: With red flags or high-risk combinations, OTC guidance should not replace clinical evaluation; we block and suggest care.
faq.a3: Only what is necessary for the current decision. Sensitive inputs are requested only when needed.
faq.a4: Outputs are structured and include risks and traces, making them easy to copy or screenshot for family or clinicians.

disclaimer.title: Important
disclaimer.body: This site provides health information and OTC references and is not medical diagnosis or prescription advice. If you take prescription meds, are pregnant/breastfeeding, are a child, or have chronic conditions, consult a clinician or pharmacist.

footer.desc: An auditable and explainable experience for everyday symptoms and OTC guidance.
footer.safetyDesc: We emphasize red-flag blocking, contraindication and interaction checks, and continuous refinement.
footer.copyright: © 2026 MedAssist. For informational use only; not medical advice.
